title: MFA Writing 25th Anniversary Celebration
description: Celebrating 25 years of the MFA Writing program at CCA — an all-year reunion bringing together alumni, faculty, students, and friends for readings, conversation, and celebration.
longDescription: Join us for a full day of readings, conversation, reunion, and celebration marking 25 years of the MFA in Writing Program at California College of the Arts. Alumni, faculty, current students, and friends gather to reflect on the program's history and the many paths a writing life can take.

schedule.label: Alumni Panel — "The Long Work — Writing Lives & Writing Worlds"
Storytelling Hour — "I Left My Heart at CCA"
